name: espresso-test
description: Owner-gated agent-orchestrated review->fix->re-review loop. A thin coordinator agent spawns a review subagent (runs deep-review), then hands the findings file to a stronger fixer subagent (RCA + mh-fix, fanning out mh-implementer), then re-reviews -- looping until a round reports 0 BLOCK/HIGH OPEN or the round cap is hit. The coordinator never reads output md, never loads rules; it only routes paths + compact status and decides stop.
required_inputs: target module, diff, or worktree changeset to converge
review base (branch/sha) for deep-review scope freeze
active worktree slug + slot (fixes edit worktrees/<slug>/{fe,be} ONLY)
model tiers: coordinator_tier (thin), review_tier, fix_tier (stronger) -- passed at invoke, NEVER baked into the workflow
round cap (default 3 per review protocol) + fix_floor (default BLOCK+HIGH) + stop policy
decision_mode (default provisional) + ask_window (default gate-only) + auto_decide_floor (default: irreversible-data/migration PARKS, everything else may go provisional)
validators: python scripts/audit_path.py <base>   # review md path discipline (delegated to deep-review)
python scripts/worktree.py list       # confirm fix worktree exists before any fix round

loop.unit: 1 round = review -> (fix if open BLOCK/HIGH at/above fix_floor) -> re-review
loop.stop_converged: reviewer blob open_block_high == 0 (COUNT-based, not verdict string); may carry N flagged PROVISIONAL decisions
loop.stop_converged_with_parked: everything shippable closed, but M findings PARKED (irreversible-data/migration business ambiguity) -> route to owner; loop never stalls on these, it parks and continues
loop.stop_cap: round > round_cap (default 3) with fixable BLOCK/HIGH still open -> honest residual per deep-review protocol sec.8 (split module / new change)
loop.fix_floor_default: BLOCK+HIGH (MED/LOW/NIT = backlog, do not spend a round)
loop.warm_start: coordinator passes prior_findings_path to the NEXT reviewer; the reviewer (not the coordinator) reads it to suppress re-raising REJECTED/PROVISIONAL findings. deep-review JS does NOT read prior rounds itself -- without this carry, REJECTED false positives churn every round

autonomy.ask_window_default: gate-only -- the ONLY blocking owner question is the round-0 pre-sweep batch, presented at invoke while the owner is present; after that the run is fire-and-forget and NEVER blocks to ask
autonomy.provisional_protocol: a business ambiguity not answered by the gate pre-seed is NOT a stop: the fixer makes a best-effort decision grounded in specs/Tai lieu Noi tru.md (cite page/section) OR a safe reversible default OR a live exemplar, IMPLEMENTS it, logs DL-PROV-<n> in specs/<module>/06-decision-log.md (real id -> passes fabricated-authority gate) + mirrors the detailed question to 05-open-questions.md, and marks the finding PROVISIONAL-FIXED. Final report surfaces ALL provisionals as one confirm/correct batch, clinical/billing/permission sorted to the top by risk-if-wrong.
autonomy.auto_decide_floor: irreversible-data/migration ONLY -- when closing an ambiguous business finding would require a hard-delete / non-backfilled migration / table reshape (data loss not undoable), the fixer PARKS it (status PARKED-NEEDS-OWNER, logged BLOCKING) instead of guessing, and the loop continues on the other findings. Clinical/billing/permission decisions MAY be provisional because the fix lands in a worktree diff the owner reviews before merge (reversible).
autonomy.never_invent_without_evidence: every provisional decision MUST cite BA-doc page/section, a safe-default rationale, or a live exemplar -- pure invention is still forbidden; provisional != unfounded

roles.coordinator: thin; NO md read, NO rule load, NO source read/edit; spawns subagents, routes file PATHS + compact status, decides stop from COUNTS. It IS the owner-facing voice: at round 0 it relays the pre-sweep question batch (a list of questions in a blob, not md bodies) to the owner and feeds the answers down as decision_preseed. After that it never asks. tier=coordinator_tier
roles.pre-sweep: round-0 read-only agent: reads specs/Tai lieu Noi tru.md + the changeset scope, returns the list of every foreseeable business/owner decision as questions (blob) for the coordinator to batch-ask the owner once at invoke; tier=review_tier
roles.reviewer: reads prior_findings_path (warm-start / FP-suppression) then runs deep-review (nested fan-out); writes findings md to docs/audit/; returns {findings_path, counts, open_block_high, verdict}; tier=review_tier
roles.fixer: input = findings_path + fix_floor + decision_preseed + decision_mode + auto_decide_floor; RCA (mh-rca) + mh-fix discipline; fans out mh-implementer per cluster; for unanswered business ambiguity applies the provisional protocol (or PARKS if irreversible-data/migration); writes DL-PROV entries to specs/<module>/06-decision-log.md + 05-open-questions.md; validates (scanner + build/typecheck); returns compact {fixed_ids, provisional_ids, parked_ids, residual_fixable_open, validation_summary, fix_refs, decision_log_path}; tier=fix_tier
